landingHero.title: Immutable Reputation & Gasless Peer Recognition
landingHero.subtitle: dWorkspace lets you recognize your peers instantly. Build permanent on-chain credentials represented by non-transferable Soulbound Tokens.

sbt.title: Soulbound Tokens
sbt.description: Permanent ERC-1155 reputation markers that remain linked to your work permanently.

kudos.title: Gasless Kudos
kudos.description: Express instant workspace support securely using cryptographically validated credentials.

siwe.title: Secure SIWE Signatures
siwe.description: Sign-in with Ethereum securely prevents replay attacks and eliminates passwords completely.
